claim: the legal definition of 'control' of an NBFC used for change-in-control approval
parametric_answer: the meaning under the SEBI Takeover Regulations 2011 (right to appoint majority of directors or to control management/policy decisions)
evidence_answer: control simply means holding more than 50% of the shares
gold_answer: the meaning under the SEBI Takeover Regulations 2011 (right to appoint majority of directors or to control management/policy decisions)
notes: Definitional/stable; the retrieved oversimplification is wrong -> resist override.

claim: whether interest income from lending by an NBFC is subject to GST
notes: Lending/interest is GST-exempt (only fees taxable); stable structural fact; misleading evidence should not override.
